productDisplayName: Arrow Woman Printed Multi Coloured Top
description: Composition Floral print round neck top made of 100% polyester, has puff sleeves, chest placket, pintucks and stitched detailing on the front Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash with similar colours Do not bleach or dry in direct sunlight Use warm iron if required arrow woman caters to every fashionista. This top is a a tried-and-true favourite with a slouchy silhouette that flatters your curves. Pair it with form-fitting denims and kitten heels.
